channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS

item.title:

item.title: Important nuance: the jury at this Musk-OpenAI trial is an *advisory* jury, hence not binding on the...
item.description:
Important nuance: the jury at this Musk-OpenAI trial is an *advisory* jury, hence not binding on the judge, and is only looking at liability (not damages, if any).
Thanks to @bahhradx for correcting an earlier misstatement of mine.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 550
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title: 有种预感，等 OpenAI 的 GPT 5.6 都能推送给普通用户的时候，Anthropic 的 Mythos 还只能给大企业玩。
item.author: @tualatrix

item.title: https://t.co/lEDLPtBt4V 新增使用攻略板块，欢迎大家自荐～ https://t.co/x3YrQx2mPQ

item.title: Thanks to the @SambaNovaAI team. Once M2.7 hits 400 TPS, latency becomes virtually imperceptible.

item.title: RT @0xJeff: Proud of my analyst, Hermes ​ This is what he has achieved after 1.5+ months of internsh...
item.description:
